content.full_text:
November 21, 1990

John E. Sill
Foreman 1990 Grand Jury
County of Sonoma
600 Administration Drive
Santa Rosa, CA 95403

Re: Your Request For Assistance
Our File No. G-90-647

Dear Mr. Sill:

Your letter to the Commission was given to me for response. The Commission’s Legal Division does provide written advice to persons with questions about their duties under the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/ (Section 83114(b).) We do not provide advice to third parties about another person’s duties unless the third party has been authorized to request advice by the person whose duties are in question. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed.) I spoke with Betty Babas, corresponding secretary for the grand jury, and she informed me that you were not requesting advice on behalf of Santa Rosa City Planning Commissioner Benjamin Tuxhorn. Therefore, we cannot provide advice on the question you have raised.

However, I have referred your letter with attachments to our Enforcement Division for review. It is my understanding that Betty Babas will be sending us copies of the minutes of recent city planning commission meetings concerning the draft general

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

plan in which Planning Commissioner Tuxhorn participated. If you have any further questions, the Enforcement division can be reached at (916) 322-6441.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

[handwritten signature]
By: Deanne Stone
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:DS:aa

Enclosure
